documents.author: Dr. Mensah
documents.title: Asthma diagnosed
documents.text: On 2026-02-01, Aisha Rahman (MRN-002055) was diagnosed with mild persistent asthma by Dr. Mensah following spirometry.

documents.author: Dr. Mensah
documents.title: Started albuterol inhaler
documents.text: On 2026-02-01, Dr. Mensah prescribed an albuterol rescue inhaler as needed for Aisha Rahman.

documents.author: Dr. Cole
documents.title: Penicillin allergy (FILED IN ERROR)
documents.text: On 2026-04-10, a penicillin allergy was entered for Aisha Rahman. This note was later found to belong to a different patient and was filed to this chart in error.

documents.author: Dr. Mensah
documents.title: Added fluticasone inhaler
documents.text: On 2026-05-20, due to ongoing symptoms, Dr. Mensah added a fluticasone inhaled corticosteroid twice daily for Aisha Rahman.
